text: Quick question — What does 'deep integration' mean to you—real-time sync, audit logs, permissions, reliability?
suggestionText: Totally—when you say “integration depth,” which systems are must-have (CRM, SSO, data warehouse), and what’s the workflow you need end-to-end?
